inputs.titre: Foundation of the New York Peace Society

reason: The image depicts a gathering of people in what appears to be a formal setting. The clothing styles (frock coats, high-waisted dresses), architecture, and lighting (candles) are all consistent with the early 19th century. There are no immediately obvious anachronisms or fantasy elements. The room is lit by candles and natural light filtering through the windows, creating an atmosphere appropriate for the era. The depiction aligns well with the description of the event.
